first_fruits.name: The First Fruits
first_fruits.text: The offerings sink into the crystal like rain into thirsty ground. YOU CARRY MUCH, the voice says. LET US CARRY SOME. Your shoulders feel lighter — permanently.

deep_gifts.name: Gifts from the Deep
deep_gifts.text: The minerals dissolve into veins of light that race outward under your field. THE BONES REMEMBER THE FLESH, the voice hums. Your fallow soil will heal three times as fast.

artisans_offering.name: The Artisan's Offering
artisans_offering.text: The crystal turns your crafted things over, marveling. YOU RESHAPE US GENTLY, it says, AND SO ARE RESHAPED. Off-world buyers will pay 5% more for everything you ship.

moonlit_harvest.name: The Moonlit Harvest
moonlit_harvest.text: The moon-touched crops rise and orbit the crystal like tiny satellites. ILO AND VESK SEE YOU, the voice says warmly. Everything you plant will grow 15% faster.

worlds_bloom.name: The World's Bloom
worlds_bloom.text: The lotuses open all at once. For a heartbeat every furrow on Veridia glows in answer. WE ARE AWAKE, the voice sings, AND WE ARE GLAD IT WAS YOU. The auroras will come more often now — the planet, dreaming louder.
